name: superimg
description: Programmatic video generation — HTML/CSS templates rendered to MP4. Teaches Codex the SuperImg defineScene API and exposes the SuperImg CLI as MCP tools.

interface.longDescription: SuperImg renders TypeScript scene definitions into video files. This plugin gives Codex the framework's mental model (std.score, std.cue, render(ctx) contracts) plus typed MCP tools for listing, validating, and rendering templates without shell-quoting CLI flags.
defaultPrompt: Create a SuperImg template that announces a launch
